head.hi: The Department of State to the Chinese Legation
head.note: Handed to the Chinese Minister by the Chief of the Division of Far Eastern Affairs on July 29, 1933.

div.p: The Department of State has recently received from several sources communications which indicate that the present authorities in Manchuria are showing much greater solicitude with regard to the meeting of past and current obligations to American creditors than was shown by the former authorities in Manchuria or is shown by the Nanking Government.
